name: DW · Fact Invoice
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS invoice_id,
    'INV-' || lpad(gs::text, 6, '0')                                           AS invoice_number,
    gs                                                                          AS sales_order_id,   -- 1:1 with SO header
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('INVCUST'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 2000)   AS customer_id,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('INVIDATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 1095)::int) AS invoice_date,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('INVAMT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 1000000)/100.0 + 20)::numeric, 2) AS amount_total,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('INVTAX'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 8))::numeric / 100.0, 2)          AS tax_rate,
    (ARRAY['Paid','Paid','Paid','Outstanding','Overdue','Void'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('INVPSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)] AS payment_status,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('INVIDATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 1095)::int) + 30 AS due_date
FROM generate_series(1, 5000) AS gs
